Title: Top Gear
Actors: Jeremy Clarkson, Richard Hammond, James May
Plot: Top Gear is a British television series about motor vehicles, primarily cars, and is a relaunched version of the original 1977 show of the same name, airing since 2002, and becoming the most widely watched factual television programme in the world.
Awards: Nominated for 7 BAFTA 12 wins & 22 nominations total
